---
title: "28060, san nazzaro sesia, italy"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: custom
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}

#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "100vh"

import requests
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from scipy.interpolate import make_interp_spline
from scipy.ndimage import gaussian_filter1d

url = "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast"
params = {
    "latitude": 41.89,
    "longitude": 12.49,
    "hourly": ["temperature_2m", "relative_humidity_2m", "dew_point_2m", "cloud_cover", "precipitation_probability"],
    "timezone": "auto",
    "forecast_days": 14
}

response = requests.get(url, params=params)
data = response.json()["hourly"]
df = pd.DataFrame(data)
df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'])

mask = (df['time'].dt.weekday.isin([5, 6])) & (df['time'].dt.hour >= 0) & (df['time'].dt.hour <= 6)
df_wk = df[mask].copy().reset_index(drop=True)

def ultra_smooth(x, y, sigma=1.5):
    y_filtered = gaussian_filter1d(y, sigma=sigma)
    
    x_new = np.linspace(x.min(), x.max(), 500) 
    spline = make_interp_spline(x, y_filtered, k=3)      
    y_smooth = spline(x_new)
    return x_new, y_smooth

x_numeric = np.arange(len(df_wk))

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots()

x_smooth, temp_smooth = ultra_smooth(x_numeric, df_wk['temperature_2m'], sigma=1.2)
_, dew_smooth = ultra_smooth(x_numeric, df_wk['dew_point_2m'], sigma=1.2)
_, hum_smooth = ultra_smooth(x_numeric, df_wk['relative_humidity_2m'], sigma=1.5)
_, cloud_smooth = ultra_smooth(x_numeric, df_wk['cloud_cover'], sigma=2.0)
_, rain_smooth = ultra_smooth(x_numeric, df_wk['precipitation_probability'], sigma=1.5)

ax1.plot(x_smooth, np.clip(temp_smooth, -20, 100), color='#377eb8')
ax1.plot(x_smooth, np.clip(dew_smooth, -20, 100), color='#ff7f00')
ax1.plot(x_smooth, np.clip(hum_smooth, 0, 100), color='#4daf4a')
ax1.plot(x_smooth, np.clip(cloud_smooth, 0, 100), color='#f781bf')
ax1.plot(x_smooth, np.clip(rain_smooth, 0, 100), color='#a65628')

ax1.set_ylim(-5, 105)
ax1.set_yticks([])

step = 6
ax1.set_xticks(x_numeric[::step])
ax1.set_xticklabels(df_wk['time'].dt.strftime('%D %H')[::step], rotation=45)

plt.show()
```

| variable | legend |
|---|---|
| temperature | <font color="#377eb8">---</font> |
| dew | <font color="#ff7f00">---</font> |
| humidity | <font color="#4daf4a">---</font> |
| cloud | <font color="#f781bf">---</font> |
| precipitation | <font color="#a65628">---</font> |
